description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful gradient wallpaper and a pill-shaped cutout at the top for front-facing sensors or cameras. The back is glossy black with a prominent silver Apple logo centered and two camera lenses plus a flash arranged in the upper left corner. The sides are thin and appear to be made of metal or reinforced plastic, contributing to a premium feel. The device is compact and lightweight, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and is designed for handheld use. No external case or cover is present, and all buttons are flush or not visible from these views.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large colorful display, glossy black back, and dual rear cameras. Features a centered Apple logo and a pill-shaped front cutout.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, vibrant display with a pill-shaped cutout at the top.
description_view_1: Left side profile, highlighting the device's slimness and lack of visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a glossy black surface, centered Apple logo, and dual cameras with flash in the upper left.
description_view_3: Right side profile, again emphasizing the thinness and absence of visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting against the glossy black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful gradient wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are located in the upper left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern.
attribute_button_layout: None visible; no physical buttons are apparent on the sides or front in these views.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: None; the device is shown without any external case or cover.
